variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11050 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11050 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11050 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P500199 Air Cleaner, Disposable | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11050
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P500199 Air Cleaner, Disposable is designed to provide reliable performance in air cleaner, disposable applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
